## 接口调用示例 
 {BaseURL}/v1/customFile/update
### 请求示例
```
{
    "customFileId": "adafas1234",
    "customFileName": "1231daasd12413",
    "customFileType": "MULTI_LEVEL",
    "options": [
        {
            "serialNumber": 1,
            "optionId": "123342",
            "optionName": "4132",
            "optionLevel": 0,  
            "status": "0",
            "children": [
                {
                    "optionId": "1412",
                    "optionName": "31241",
                    "optionLevel": 1
                    "serialNumber": 1,,
                    "children": []
                }
            ]
        }
    ]
}
```
### 返回示例
```
{
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！"
}
```
